explanation.yes: {{name}} carries positive, affirming energy. This card supports forward movement and favorable outcomes.
explanation.no: {{name}} suggests obstacles, upheaval, or the need to pause. The timing may not be right, or a different approach is needed.
explanation.maybe: {{name}} is context-dependent. The answer depends on surrounding cards and your specific situation.

explanationKeywords.yes: This card's energy of {{keywords}} leans toward a positive outcome.
explanationKeywords.no: This card's energy of {{keywords}} suggests challenges or delays.

mbti.title: Personality Type Assessment
mbti.description: This assessment explores the way you naturally process information, make decisions, and move through the world. Instead of judging personality as right or wrong, it highlights your default strengths, your blind spots under stress, and what you tend to need from relationships and environments to thrive.
whatYouGet: Your type profile with strengths + blind spots

loveLanguage.title: Love Language Assessment
loveLanguage.description: This assessment helps you discover how you most naturally give and receive love. Many relationship conflicts are not a lack of love — they are a mismatch of expression. You will receive a primary and secondary love language with clear ways to ask for what you need.
whatYouGet: Clear ways to ask for love in your language

enneagram.title: Enneagram Type Assessment
enneagram.description: This assessment identifies your core motivation and the emotional pattern that drives your choices. You will discover your primary type, your wing, growth directions, and stress signatures.

bigfive.title: Big Five Assessment
bigfive.description: This assessment measures five core personality dimensions: openness, conscientiousness, extraversion, agreeableness, and emotional stability. The most research-validated personality framework.
whatYouGet: Five trait scores with real-life interpretation
Strengths + potential pitfalls for each trait

attachment.title: Attachment Style Assessment
attachment.description: This assessment reveals how you form and maintain close bonds. You will identify your default attachment pattern in relationships and learn strategies for earning secure attachment.
whatYouGet: What you need from a partner to feel safe

mood.title: Mood Check-In
mood.description: A short daily check-in to track how you are feeling and what your emotional needs are today.
whatYouGet: A journal prompt for your current state

mbtiQuick.title: Quick Personality Type
mbtiQuick.description: A fast 12-question read on how you recharge, perceive, decide, and structure your life. Great as an intro — upgrade to the full 70-question deep dive any time for a more precise result.
whatYouGet: Upgrade path to the full 70-question deep read

qei1.text: I recharge best around energetic groups of people.

qei2.text: After a long social event, I need solo time to recover.

qei3.text: I process ideas best by talking them out with others.

qsn1.text: I trust concrete facts and details more than hunches.

qsn2.text: I love imagining future possibilities and abstract ideas.

qsn3.text: Proven, practical methods appeal to me more than novel theories.

qtf1.text: Logic and fairness matter more to me than sparing feelings when I decide.

qtf2.text: My first thought when deciding is how it affects the people involved.

qtf3.text: Getting to the objective truth matters more than keeping the peace.

qjp1.text: I feel calmer when plans and schedules are set in advance.

qjp2.text: I prefer to keep options open and see what unfolds.

qjp3.text: Deadlines and structure bring out my best work.

courtMatch.title: Tarot Court Card Match
courtMatch.description: Twelve cards. One verdict. Which of the sixteen court cards of the tarot best mirrors your current energy? This reading pairs elemental style (Wands / Cups / Swords / Pentacles) with rank (Page / Knight / Queen / King) so you get a living archetype — not just a trait.
whatYouGet: Which of 16 tarot court cards mirrors you
Strengths, shadow, and an affirmation to carry

ce1.text: When faced with a problem, I first…

options.1: Burn through it with passion and force.
options.2: Feel it in my body and follow my gut.
options.3: Break it down and analyze every angle.

options.2: Cozy time with the people I love.

ce4.text: I lose track of time when I'm…

options.3: Writing, debating, or puzzling something out.
options.4: Crafting, gardening, or working with my hands.

options.1: I question it — I'm still learning the ropes.
options.4: I've become it — I set the standard.

options.1: Ask a lot of questions and soak it all in.

options.2: I chase it — I want to make it happen.
options.3: I adapt and nurture others through it.
options.4: I steady the ship so nothing breaks.

options.1: I still have so much to learn.
options.2: To trust my instincts and move.

options.1: Share the excitement of discovering it.
options.2: Teach through doing — lead by example.
options.3: Mentor gently, one person at a time.
options.4: Set the bar others aspire to.

options.1: Open and fresh — I feel things vividly.
options.3: Deep and containing — I hold others' feelings too.

shadowArchetype.title: Shadow Archetype
shadowArchetype.description: Which inner archetype is running the room right now? This reading maps you to one of the seven deep patterns — Lover, Warrior, Magician, Sovereign, Sage, Innocent, or Explorer — with the gift each one brings, the shadow it casts when wounded, and a path toward integration.
whatYouGet: Your dominant Jungian archetype (Lover, Warrior, Magician, Sovereign, Sage, Innocent, Explorer)
The gift it brings when healthy
The shadow it casts when wounded
A path toward integration + tarot pairing

lov1.text: Deep emotional intimacy is what makes life worth living.

lov2.text: I often feel other people's emotions as vividly as my own.

lov3.text: I give myself fully when I love someone or something.

war1.text: I am willing to fight — literally or metaphorically — for what I believe in.

war2.text: Discipline and follow-through are core to who I am.

war3.text: I step up to protect people who can't protect themselves.

mag1.text: I'm drawn to hidden knowledge — the underneath of things.

mag2.text: I see patterns and connections others often miss.

mag3.text: Helping someone transform the way they see themselves is one of my deepest pleasures.

sov1.text: People naturally look to me to set the direction.

sov2.text: I feel responsible for the well-being of the systems I'm part of.

sov3.text: I have a clear sense of what I am the standard-bearer for.

sag1.text: I'm happier as a teacher / witness than as the main character.

sag2.text: I need long solitary stretches to think things through.

sag3.text: I value understanding a thing deeply more than acting on it quickly.

inn1.text: I lead with hope, even when things look hard.

inn2.text: The simple pleasures (a walk, a meal, good light) matter enormously to me.

inn3.text: I trust people by default, not by evidence.

exp2.text: I've reinvented my life more than once.

exp3.text: Being somewhere unfamiliar is one of my favourite feelings.

elementAffinity.title: Element Affinity
elementAffinity.description: Ten quick questions to discover which of the four classical elements most echoes how you actually live — fire, water, air, or earth. Pairs with your astrology chart's native element for a "chart says X, behaviour says Y" comparison.
whatYouGet: How it differs from your astrology chart element
Strengths, shadow, and when it's running the show

el1.text: My natural pace is best described as…

options.2: Ebbs and flows with my mood.

el2.text: What do you crave most when the day gets rough?

options.2: Softness — a bath, a hug, good food.
options.3: Information — a podcast, a conversation, a reframe.

options.4: Craft — I make from refinement and skill.

el4.text: A meaningful gift to me is…

options.2: A hand-written note or something sentimental.
options.3: A book, a conversation, or a new idea.
options.4: Something beautifully made or useful for my home.

options.1: I'm forced to sit still for too long.
options.2: I'm disconnected from people I love.
options.3: I don't understand what's going on.

options.4: Plants, texture, materials I can touch.

el7.text: What do you spend money on most easily?

options.2: Beauty, care, gifts for loved ones.

el8.text: Under pressure, my default move is…

options.4: Simplify, slow down, return to basics.

el9.text: A compliment that would land hardest is…

el10.text: The season I love most is…

ayurveda-dosha.title: Ayurvedic Dosha
ayurveda-dosha.description: Thirty questions on body, mind, and habits to reveal your dominant dosha — Vata (air/space), Pitta (fire/water), or Kapha (earth/water). Ayurveda is the traditional Indian system of mind-body wellness; your dosha shows the default way your nature expresses itself and what tends to throw it out of balance.
whatYouGet: Your primary dosha (Vata, Pitta, or Kapha)
Your secondary dosha if you're dual-type
Diet and lifestyle tips that actually suit you
Warning signs you're out of balance

page-of-wands.name: Page of Wands
page-of-wands.whenDrawn: A new creative fire is lighting — explore it before planning it.
page-of-wands.affirmation: I follow what lights me up without needing it to be perfect yet.

knight-of-wands.name: Knight of Wands
knight-of-wands.whenDrawn: Move — but watch the cost of speed. The fire wants direction.
knight-of-wands.affirmation: I move with passion and pace myself for the long road.

queen-of-wands.name: Queen of Wands
queen-of-wands.whenDrawn: Step fully into your light. Others follow the one who burns clearly.
queen-of-wands.affirmation: My presence is my power — I take up the space that is mine.

king-of-wands.name: King of Wands
king-of-wands.whenDrawn: You are ready to build long-range. Lead from purpose, not pressure.
king-of-wands.affirmation: I lead with clear vision and trust others to carry their part.

page-of-cups.name: Page of Cups
page-of-cups.whenDrawn: A tender feeling or creative spark wants attention — honour it.
page-of-cups.affirmation: I let my softness be a source of information, not a liability.

knight-of-cups.name: Knight of Cups
knight-of-cups.whenDrawn: Follow the feeling — but ground it with action, not fantasy alone.
knight-of-cups.affirmation: I pursue what I love with both heart and feet on the ground.

queen-of-cups.name: Queen of Cups
queen-of-cups.whenDrawn: Your emotional intelligence is a gift. Also — tend your own cup first.
queen-of-cups.affirmation: I feel deeply and also know where I end and others begin.

king-of-cups.name: King of Cups
king-of-cups.whenDrawn: You are the calm others rely on — make sure you have somewhere to feel, too.
king-of-cups.affirmation: I hold space for others because I know how to hold space for myself.

page-of-swords.name: Page of Swords
page-of-swords.whenDrawn: A new idea wants investigating — ask before you assume.
page-of-swords.affirmation: I ask questions before I draw conclusions.

knight-of-swords.name: Knight of Swords
knight-of-swords.whenDrawn: Your truth is strong — deliver it without running people over.
knight-of-swords.affirmation: I speak truth with both edge and care.

queen-of-swords.name: Queen of Swords
queen-of-swords.whenDrawn: Your clarity is needed — let honesty and warmth arrive together.
queen-of-swords.affirmation: I see clearly and speak kindly.

king-of-swords.name: King of Swords
king-of-swords.whenDrawn: You are the one others trust to cut clean — lead from ethics, not ego.
king-of-swords.affirmation: I decide from principle and remain open to new evidence.

page-of-pentacles.name: Page of Pentacles
page-of-pentacles.whenDrawn: A new skill or venture is worth investing in — start small, stay steady.
page-of-pentacles.affirmation: I begin where I am and trust the accumulation of small steps.

knight-of-pentacles.name: Knight of Pentacles
knight-of-pentacles.whenDrawn: Steady wins here — but occasionally, the slow path needs a shake.
knight-of-pentacles.affirmation: I honour my discipline and allow myself moments of play.

queen-of-pentacles.name: Queen of Pentacles
queen-of-pentacles.whenDrawn: You tend to everyone's garden — remember to plant in your own.
queen-of-pentacles.affirmation: I give from fullness, not from fear.

king-of-pentacles.name: King of Pentacles
king-of-pentacles.whenDrawn: You have built something real — now shape what it means, not just what it has.
king-of-pentacles.affirmation: I measure wealth by what I protect and what I give, not only by what I hold.

sneakPeek.label: Early reading:
sneakPeek.mbti: You're leaning {{letters}} so far — keep going to confirm.

courtMatchElement.wands: A Wands card is taking shape — fire energy leads.
courtMatchElement.cups: A Cups card is emerging — water leads.
courtMatchElement.swords: A Swords card is forming — air leads.
courtMatchElement.pentacles: A Pentacles card is building — earth leads.

sneakPeek.loveLanguage: Your primary love language is starting to emerge...
sneakPeek.enneagram: A type pattern is forming — keep going for your wing.
sneakPeek.attachment: Your attachment style is coming into focus...
sneakPeek.bigFive: Your trait profile is taking shape...

lover.name: The Lover
lover.gift: You lead with connection. When you are in your power, life feels warm, sensual, and meaningful. You create belonging wherever you go.
lover.shadow: When wounded, the Lover drowns — co-dependence, obsession, or losing yourself in someone else. The shadow can also show up as the opposite: shutting down entirely to avoid being hurt.
lover.integration: Anchor in self-knowledge so your giving is a choice, not a compulsion. Practice loving without needing to merge.
lover.affirmation: I open my heart from fullness, not fear — and I remain myself inside the love.

warrior.name: The Warrior
warrior.tagline: The one who acts for what matters.
warrior.gift: You bring discipline, courage, and follow-through. You protect what you love and move when others freeze. Your word is your weapon.
warrior.shadow: The wounded Warrior becomes the bully — fighting for the sake of fighting, turning every conversation into combat, or burning out in service of a cause. The shadow can also collapse into the coward who stays silent.
warrior.integration: Fight for, not just against. Rest is not retreat. The sword and the sheath both belong to the Warrior.
warrior.affirmation: I act with discipline and care — I know when to move and when to rest.

magician.name: The Magician
magician.gift: You read the hidden patterns. You transform — yourself, a room, a relationship, a problem — by seeing what others don't. Knowledge is your weapon and your gift.
magician.shadow: The wounded Magician manipulates. Uses insight to control, withholds truth as power, or becomes a detached observer who refuses to live. The shadow can also be the charlatan — mistaking knowing about for knowing.
magician.integration: Translate your insight into real service to other people. Teach what you know. Let yourself be transformed, not just be the one who transforms.
magician.affirmation: I use my sight to illuminate, not to dominate.

sovereign.name: The Sovereign
sovereign.tagline: The one who sets the standard.
sovereign.gift: You see the whole field and take responsibility for it. You create order, set vision, and hold the wellbeing of the group. Others find their place near you.
sovereign.shadow: The wounded Sovereign becomes the tyrant — controlling, rigid, taking everything personally. Or collapses into the abdicator: refusing the throne out of fear of its weight.
sovereign.integration: Lead for the people, not from the ego. Delegate. Let others be sovereigns too.
sovereign.affirmation: I hold my power in service of something larger than myself.

sage.name: The Sage
sage.tagline: The one who sees clearly from the edge.
sage.gift: You stay calm in chaos. You ask the questions no one else is asking. You bring long-range wisdom and the patience to tell the truth without needing the credit.
sage.shadow: The wounded Sage becomes the cynic — knowing, detached, refusing to act or feel. Or the ivory-tower recluse who won't come down from the mountain.
sage.integration: Wisdom that stays inside you becomes bitter. Teach. Get close. Risk being wrong.
sage.affirmation: I step down from the mountain and walk among the people I love.

innocent.name: The Innocent
innocent.gift: You protect hope. You see goodness where others see rot. Your trust, optimism, and simplicity are a gift to the people around you.
innocent.shadow: The wounded Innocent refuses to see shadow at all — naive to harm, stuck in fantasy, or trapped in a perpetual "it will be fine" that blocks real action.
innocent.integration: Keep your faith but earn your eyes. You can be hopeful AND clear-eyed. Both / and.
innocent.affirmation: I keep hope with open eyes.

explorer.name: The Explorer
explorer.gift: You find the edge. You know new territory is where you come alive, and you show others that the life they have is not the only life possible. Freedom is your medicine.
explorer.shadow: The wounded Explorer runs — from intimacy, from follow-through, from the ordinary life that would actually grow them. The shadow keeps leaving just before anything gets real.
explorer.integration: Stay. Go deep in one place. The new territory you haven't explored yet may be intimacy, not geography.
explorer.affirmation: I travel both outward and inward — some of my deepest exploration happens in staying.

fire.name: Fire
fire.description: Fire lives through passion and velocity. You create from heat — inspired action, bold initiative, the will to begin. When you are in your element, life feels intense, creative, and directional.
fire.whenDominant: You start more than you finish — not a weakness, a signature. Build structure around you that finishes for you, or partner with an Earth-leaning teammate.
fire.affirmation: My spark is valuable — I honour both when to ignite and when to rest the embers.

water.name: Water
water.description: Water lives through emotion and attunement. You know the room before anyone speaks. You create from feeling, love from depth, and heal by holding space. You are porous by design.
water.whenDominant: Your gift is your permeability — also your hardest edge. Learn to tend your own cup first. Water without banks becomes a flood.
water.affirmation: I feel everything and I stay myself.

air.name: Air
air.description: Air lives through mind. You connect ideas, name what others can't, and move by understanding. Conversations, books, language, breath — these are your medicine and your medium.
air.whenDominant: Get in your body. Let thoughts turn into action without needing another round of analysis. The mind is a great servant and a terrible master.
air.affirmation: I think to understand, and I live to land.

earth.name: Earth
earth.description: Earth lives through matter. You create with your hands, know through your body, and build for the long road. Stability is not boring to you — it is the ground for everything else.
earth.whenDominant: Your gift is durability. Your risk is staying too long. Let some things end so new things can root.
earth.affirmation: I build for the long road and allow seasons to turn.

elements.matchNote: Your behavioural element matches your astrology chart — you're living in alignment with your native energy.
elements.differNote: Your chart says {{natal}} but your behaviour says {{behaviour}} — worth noticing where you're stretching.

horoscope.moodDescription: Your energy levels indicate a {{vibe}} day ahead.
horoscope.moonPhaseText: New Moon on the 12th amplifies new beginnings
weeklyInsights: Early week brings clarity in communication. Mid-week favors bold decisions. Weekend calls for rest.
Focus on relationships early in the week. Career matters peak mid-week. Financial review needed by Friday.
Monday starts slow but momentum builds. Wednesday brings unexpected news. Weekend offers romantic possibilities.
Creative energy high at week's start. Practical matters demand attention mid-week. Saturday perfect for social events.
monthlyThemes: This month emphasizes personal transformation. Career opportunities arise around the 15th. Love life stabilizes by month's end.
Financial matters dominate early month. Relationship developments mid-month. Personal growth accelerates in final week.
Health and wellness take center stage. Professional recognition comes unexpectedly. Emotional clarity arrives by the 20th.

blog.subtitle: Tarot, astrology and self-discovery
blog.comeBackSoon: Check back soon for tarot insights and spiritual guidance.

tarot.title: Tarot Card Meanings
tarot.subtitle: A complete guide to every card in the tarot deck — upright and reversed meanings, love and career interpretations, and reflection prompts.
tarot.freeTarotGuideDesc: Get a free beginner's guide to tarot readings — delivered to your inbox.
tarot.youreIn: You're in! Check your inbox for your free tarot guide.
tarot.heroSub: A complete guide to every card in the tarot deck — upright and reversed meanings, love and career interpretations, and reflection prompts.
tarot.bottomText: Ready to put these meanings into practice?
tarot.pageTitle: Tarot Card Meanings — All 78 Cards Explained
tarot.pageDesc: Explore the meaning of all 78 tarot cards. Upright and reversed meanings, love and career interpretations, keywords, and reflection prompts for every card.

major.title: Major Arcana
major.subtitle: The Fool's Journey
major.desc: The 22 Major Arcana cards represent life's major themes, spiritual lessons, and turning points. From The Fool's innocent first step to The World's triumphant completion, these cards tell the story of the soul's evolution.

wands.title: Suit of Wands
wands.subtitle: Fire · Passion · Creation
wands.desc: Wands represent passion, creativity, ambition, and energy. They speak to what drives you — your goals, desires, and the spark that sets everything in motion.

cups.title: Suit of Cups
cups.subtitle: Water · Emotion · Intuition
cups.desc: Cups represent emotions, relationships, intuition, and the inner world. They reflect how you feel, who you love, and the depths of your emotional landscape.

swords.title: Suit of Swords
swords.subtitle: Air · Intellect · Truth
swords.desc: Swords represent thought, communication, conflict, and truth. They cut through illusion to reveal what is — sometimes painfully, always honestly.

pentacles.title: Suit of Pentacles
pentacles.subtitle: Earth · Material · Growth
pentacles.desc: Pentacles represent money, career, health, and the physical world. They ground the spiritual in the practical — what you build, earn, and nurture.

detail.loveFallback: Trust your intuition in matters of the heart. This card brings energy of emotional depth and connection to your romantic life.
detail.loveInsightReversed: In reversal, examine what blocks emotional openness in your relationships.
detail.loveInsightUpright: Embrace vulnerability and openness in your connections today.
detail.careerFallback: Professional insights await your discovery. This card highlights growth opportunities and strategic decisions in your work life.
detail.careerInsightReversed: Consider what fears may be limiting your professional growth.
detail.careerInsightUpright: Take inspired action toward your professional goals today.
detail.reflectionFallback: What message does this card hold for your journey? How does its energy resonate with your current situation?
detail.journalPrompt1: How does the imagery of this card speak to me today?
detail.journalPrompt2: What aspect of this card's meaning challenges me most?
detail.journalPrompt3: What small action can I take today to honor this card's guidance?
detail.todaysActionText: Pick one small action that aligns with {{name}}'s energy. Make it easy enough to do in 10 minutes.

settings.getNotified: Get notified for your daily ritual
settings.noTransits: No transits found for this period

compatibility.disclaimer: This app is for reflection and entertainment. It does not provide medical, legal, or financial advice.
compatibility.optionalLabel: Optional: More details for deeper insight
compatibility.bestMatchesSubtitle: As a {{sign}}, you're most compatible with:
compatibility.reflectionDisclaimer: This is a reflection tool - not a verdict. Use it to spark conversation and understanding.
advice: Focus on open communication and shared experiences.
Appreciate your differences as opportunities for growth.
Create space for both togetherness and independence.

toasts.loadSavedFailed: Could not load saved items — you may be offline

empty.getAIFromTarot: Get AI interpretations from the Tarot section

tarot-basics.title: Tarot Basics
tarot-basics.description: Learn the fundamentals of tarot reading

sections.title: Major vs Minor Arcana
sections.content: The Major Arcana consists of 22 cards representing life's major themes and spiritual lessons. The Minor Arcana has 56 cards divided into four suits, representing day-to-day experiences.

sections.title: The Four Suits
sections.content: Wands (Fire - Passion), Cups (Water - Emotions), Swords (Air - Thoughts), Pentacles (Earth - Material)

sections.title: Reading Spreads
sections.content: Different card layouts like the Three-Card Spread (Past-Present-Future) and Celtic Cross provide various perspectives on questions.

sections.title: Reversed Cards
sections.content: When cards appear upside down, they can indicate blocked energy, internalized energy, or the opposite meaning.

sections.title: The Four Dichotomies
sections.content: E/I (Energy direction), S/N (Information processing), T/F (Decision making), J/P (Lifestyle approach)

sections.title: Cognitive Functions
sections.content: Each type uses eight cognitive functions in a specific order, determining how they perceive and judge the world.

sections.title: Your Type's Strengths
sections.content: Every type has unique gifts — INTJs excel at strategic thinking, ENFPs at inspiring others, ISTJs at reliability.

sections.title: Growth Areas
sections.content: Understanding your inferior function helps identify areas for personal development and stress management.

love-languages.title: Love Languages
love-languages.description: The 5 ways we give and receive love

sections.title: Words of Affirmation
sections.content: Verbal compliments, encouragement, and expressions of appreciation make you feel most loved.

sections.title: Acts of Service
sections.content: Actions speak louder than words — doing helpful things shows care and consideration.

sections.title: Receiving Gifts
sections.content: Thoughtful presents, big or small, represent love and show you were thought of.

sections.title: Quality Time
sections.content: Undivided attention and meaningful shared experiences are how you feel valued.

sections.title: Physical Touch
sections.content: Appropriate physical connection — hugs, hand-holding, closeness — communicates love.

zodiac-elements.title: Zodiac Elements
zodiac-elements.description: Fire, Earth, Air, and Water signs

sections.title: Fire Signs
sections.content: Aries, Leo, Sagittarius — Passionate, enthusiastic, bold, and inspirational. They lead with action.

sections.title: Earth Signs
sections.content: Taurus, Virgo, Capricorn — Grounded, practical, reliable, and focused on tangible results.

sections.title: Air Signs
sections.content: Gemini, Libra, Aquarius — Intellectual, communicative, social, and idea-oriented.

sections.title: Water Signs
sections.content: Cancer, Scorpio, Pisces — Emotional, intuitive, empathetic, and deeply feeling.

sections.title: Element Compatibility
sections.content: Fire and Air energize each other. Earth and Water nurture each other. Similar elements understand each other.

sections.title: New Moon
sections.content: Time for new beginnings, setting intentions, and planting seeds for the future.

sections.title: Waxing Moon
sections.content: Building energy phase — take action on your goals, make progress, attract what you want.

sections.title: Full Moon
sections.content: Peak energy for manifestation, celebration, and releasing what no longer serves you.

sections.title: Waning Moon
sections.content: Time for reflection, rest, letting go, and clearing space for new opportunities.

sections.title: Moon Rituals
sections.content: Write intentions on new moons, charge crystals during full moons, and practice gratitude journaling.

sections.title: Clear Quartz
sections.content: The master healer — amplifies energy, clarifies thoughts, enhances spiritual awareness.

sections.title: Amethyst
sections.content: Calming and protective — promotes peaceful sleep, intuition, and spiritual connection.

sections.title: Rose Quartz
sections.content: The love stone — attracts love, promotes self-love, heals emotional wounds.

sections.title: Black Tourmaline
sections.content: Protective shield — grounds energy, repels negativity, provides emotional stability.

sections.title: Citrine
sections.content: Abundance and joy — attracts prosperity, enhances creativity, radiates positive energy.

sections.title: Root Chakra
sections.content: Red — Grounding, security, survival. Located at the base of spine. Balanced = stable and secure.

sections.title: Sacral Chakra
sections.content: Orange — Creativity, sexuality, emotions. Below navel. Balanced = passionate and creative.

sections.title: Solar Plexus
sections.content: Yellow — Personal power, confidence, will. Upper abdomen. Balanced = confident and purposeful.

sections.title: Heart Chakra
sections.content: Green — Love, compassion, connection. Center of chest. Balanced = loving and accepting.

sections.title: Throat Chakra
sections.content: Blue — Communication, truth, expression. Throat. Balanced = authentic and expressive.

sections.title: Third Eye
sections.content: Indigo — Intuition, wisdom, insight. Between eyebrows. Balanced = intuitive and wise.

sections.title: Crown Chakra
sections.content: Violet — Spiritual connection, enlightenment. Top of head. Balanced = spiritually connected.

sections.title: Life Path Number
sections.content: Calculated from birthdate — reveals your life's purpose and the path you're meant to walk.

sections.title: Expression Number
sections.content: From your full name — shows your natural talents, abilities, and how you express yourself.

sections.title: Soul Urge
sections.content: From vowels in your name — reveals your innermost desires, motivations, and what drives you.

sections.title: Personality Number
sections.content: From consonants — how others perceive you, the mask you show to the world.

sections.title: Master Numbers
sections.content: 11, 22, 33 carry powerful spiritual significance and heightened potential for growth.

library.continueExploring: Continue exploring the guides to deepen your spiritual practice

streak.dedication: Amazing dedication to your cosmic journey!

general: The cosmic energies align to support your {focus} today.
Trust the universe as it guides you toward {theme}.
Your {strength} serves you well in today's energies.
The stars encourage you to embrace your {element} nature.
Today's planetary influences highlight your natural {talent}.
Your ruling planet {planet} strengthens your resolve today.
Cosmic wisdom suggests focusing on {area} today.
Something stirs beneath the surface today — your {element} instincts can guide you.
Today's energy favors depth over speed — let your {talent} unfold naturally.
The celestial tide carries you toward {area} with {quality} energy.
love: Your {loveStyle} approach to love attracts meaningful connections.
Venus energy enhances your natural charm and magnetism.
Emotional authenticity deepens your romantic bonds today.
The stars support heartfelt communication with loved ones.
Your {sign} energy creates magnetic attraction — but use it for depth, not just allure.
Today favors {loveAction} in your romantic life.
Someone close to you needs to hear something you've been holding back.
The way you love — {loveStyle} — is exactly what someone in your life needs right now.
Today's energy supports healing an old wound in how you give and receive love.
career: The stars favor {workActivity} in your career path.
Trust your {sign} instincts in business decisions.
The cosmos supports ambitious pursuits and goals.
Today rewards the kind of quiet competence you carry naturally.
A professional opportunity may not look obvious at first — your {sign} instincts will recognize it.
Today favors strategy over speed at work — use your {careerStrength} deliberately.
Someone in your professional sphere is paying closer attention than you realize.
wellness: Balance your {sign} tendencies with mindful rest.
Your body is asking for {wellnessAction} — listen before it shouts.
The {element} in you needs {nurturing} today — it is not a luxury, it is fuel.
Self-care rituals align with cosmic energies today.
A short practice of {selfCareActivity} could shift your entire energy for the day.
Your {sign} tendency to push through needs a counterbalance today.
The cosmos reminds you: rest is productive when your body is asking for it.
reflection: How can you honor your {sign} nature more fully today?
What would embracing your {strength} look like right now?
Where might your {challenge} be holding you back?
How does your {element} element guide your decisions?
What message does {planet} have for you today?
What would your highest self choose in this moment?
How can you transform {challenge} into strength?
What is your intuition telling you about {area}?
If your {element} nature could speak freely, what would it ask for today?
What is one thing you are avoiding that your {sign} instincts already know the answer to?
shadow: Your {challenge} may surface today — notice it without judgment.
The shadow of your {sign} nature asks: where are you avoiding truth?
Today's tension point is {challenge} — awareness alone begins to dissolve it.
{planet}'s influence stirs something unresolved — sit with it rather than running.
Your {element} shadow might pull you toward {challenge} — choose {strength} instead.
Notice where you default to {challenge} today and ask what you really need underneath.
The cosmos highlights a pattern you have been circling.
Your shadow is not your enemy — it is {challenge} asking to be understood.
Something today may trigger your {challenge} — growth is in responding differently.
Today asks: can you hold {strength} and {challenge} at the same time?
caution: Avoid making permanent decisions from a temporary emotional state.
Watch for {challenge} disguising itself as confidence today.
Not every battle today needs your energy — choose wisely.
Be careful with promises today — say less and deliver more.
Your {element} nature may push too hard — ease off where resistance feels wrong.
Today is not the day to force resolution — let some things breathe.
Boundaries need reinforcement today, especially around your energy and time.
The cosmos advises against rushing — what feels urgent may not be important.
Protect your peace today — not everything that demands a response deserves one.
Be mindful of projecting your {challenge} onto others.
ritual: Close your eyes for 60 seconds and visualize your {element} element surrounding you.
Write the word "{strength}" on your palm or a piece of paper. Carry it today.
Place one hand over your heart and say quietly: "I trust my {sign} instincts."
Step outside for 30 seconds. Feel the air. Let your {element} nature reset.
Take three slow breaths and with each exhale, release one worry about {challenge}.
Hold something warm. Invite {planet}'s energy into your awareness for one minute.
Ask: "What does my {element} self need right now?" Listen for the first word that arrives.
Write one sentence about what {dayTheme} means to you today. Fold the paper and keep it close.
Touch something grounding — wood, stone, your own skin — and breathe your {strength} in.
Whisper your daily affirmation three times. Let it settle in your chest.
actionSteps: Take 5 minutes to journal about what you are grateful for today.
Reach out to someone you have been thinking about.
Set one clear intention for the day and write it down.
Spend 10 minutes in quiet meditation or reflection.
Do one thing that scares you a little.
Name one emotion you are carrying right now without judging it.
Tell someone what you appreciate about them, with one specific example.
Make one decision you have been postponing.
Do something physical for 10 minutes — walk, stretch, dance.
Before bed tonight, write one sentence about what today taught you.
Replace one complaint today with a request for what you need.
Choose one relationship and invest 10 minutes of genuine attention.

sun.positive: Your authentic self shines brightly today

moon.positive: Your emotional wisdom guides you well

mars.positive: Your drive and determination are strong

jupiter.positive: Abundance and opportunity flow toward you

neptune.positive: Your imagination and intuition are heightened

fire.advice: Channel your passion into meaningful pursuits
fire.challenge: Practice patience and consider others' perspectives

earth.challenge: Embrace change as an opportunity for growth

air.advice: Share your ideas and connect with others
air.challenge: Balance thinking with feeling and action

water.advice: Trust your inner wisdom and emotional intelligence
water.challenge: Set healthy boundaries while remaining compassionate

errorBoundary.title: The Stars Have Shifted
errorBoundary.message: Something unexpected disrupted your cosmic journey. The universe works in mysterious ways, but we can try again.
errorBoundary.tailFooter: If this continues, the cosmos may need a moment to realign.
errorBoundary.networkMessage: We couldn't reach the cosmic servers. Check your connection and try again when the path is clear.
errorBoundary.notFoundMessage: The page you seek has vanished into the void. Perhaps the stars have a different destination in mind.

billing.webNotAvailableOnMobile: Web billing is not available on mobile. Please use the app store.
billing.stripeNotConfigured: Stripe is not configured. Please contact support.

1.title: The Pioneer
1.purpose: You are here to lead, originate, and carve paths where none existed. Your lesson is learning to trust your own direction without needing permission.
challenges: Going it alone when collaboration would serve
1.affirmation: I set my own direction — and I let others walk alongside me.

2.title: The Diplomat
2.purpose: You are here to harmonize — to hold the space between people, to read nuance, to build through connection rather than force. Your lesson is finding your own voice inside the bridge you build.
2.affirmation: I hold the space between — and I stay myself inside the bridge.

3.title: The Expresser
3.purpose: You are here to express, inspire, and spark joy. Language, art, performance, teaching — these are your native mediums. Your lesson is letting depth and discipline shape the gift.
challenges: Avoiding hard feelings by staying bright
3.affirmation: I create, express, and go deep — brightness and depth belong together.

4.title: The Builder
4.purpose: You are here to build what lasts. Systems, institutions, crafts, homes. Your lesson is allowing the work to breathe — rigidity is the enemy of durability.
4.affirmation: I build for the long road and allow the structure to evolve.

5.title: The Explorer
5.purpose: You are here to experience. To move, travel, transform. You are the one who shows others that the life they have is not the only life possible. Your lesson is staying long enough to let experiences land.
5.affirmation: I travel widely — and I stay long enough to be changed.

6.title: The Nurturer
6.purpose: You are here to love and tend — family, community, the vulnerable, the home. Your lesson is loving without losing yourself inside the caretaking.
6.affirmation: I give from fullness and tend my own garden first.

7.title: The Seeker
7.purpose: You are here to go deep. Study, reflect, uncover what is true. You bring the long-range wisdom that holds a community steady. Your lesson is sharing what you know instead of hoarding it.
7.affirmation: I bring my depth into the world — wisdom is meant to be shared.

8.title: The Architect
8.purpose: You are here to lead at scale — to move resources, build enterprises, steward power responsibly. Your lesson is remembering that material mastery and spiritual integrity are one path, not two.
8.affirmation: I build wealth and power in service of what I love.

9.title: The Humanitarian
9.purpose: You are here to love broadly — causes, humanity, the planet. You finish what needs ending and give what needs giving. Your lesson is staying present inside your own life while also holding the bigger picture.
9.affirmation: I love wide and I live close — both at once.

11.title: The Intuitive Messenger
11.purpose: A master path. You are here to see what others can't and translate it into language people can carry. Your lesson is grounding the vision — channel it, don't be consumed by it.
11.affirmation: I channel the vision and stay rooted in my body.

22.title: The Master Builder
22.tagline: Vision into form at large scale.
22.purpose: A master path. You are here to build something enduring — an institution, a body of work, a movement. Your lesson is trusting the scale of your own capability.
challenges: Feeling the weight of your own potential
22.affirmation: I trust my capacity — and I build with others, not in isolation.

33.title: The Master Teacher
33.tagline: Love in service at a collective scale.
33.purpose: The rarest master path. You are here to love, heal, and teach at a scale that shapes communities. Your lesson is self-care — you cannot pour from an empty cup, and your cup is asked for often.
challenges: Forgetting to be a person, not just a role
33.affirmation: I love and serve from fullness — my own life matters as much as anyone's.

iching.title: I-Ching Oracle
iching.intro: The I-Ching — the Book of Changes — is the oldest divination system in the world. Hold a question in mind. Throw the coins six times. The hexagram that appears reflects the moving energies around your question.
iching.questionPlaceholder: What would be most helpful for me to understand right now?
iching.transformNote: The changing lines show the energy moving toward this second hexagram — read as "where this situation is heading".

humanDesign.title: Human Design
humanDesign.intro: Human Design maps the unique way you are built to engage with the world. Your type, strategy, authority, and profile show the path of least resistance — the way you are designed to make decisions, do work, and find alignment.
humanDesign.disclaimer: This is a lightweight reading. A full Human Design chart uses planetary positions from your exact birth moment. For the complete 9-centre bodygraph, export your birth data and visit a dedicated Human Design site.

bazi.title: Bazi — Four Pillars of Destiny
bazi.intro: Bazi — "eight characters" — is the traditional Chinese reading of your birth moment as four pillars: year, month, day, and hour. Each pillar carries one of the five elements (wood, fire, earth, metal, water) and a yin or yang polarity. Together they show your Day Master — the axis of your nature — and where the elements of your life run rich or run thin.

strong.name: Dominant
strong.desc: Your day-master element runs rich. You assert naturally; the growth edge is in flow and release.

balanced.name: Balanced
balanced.desc: Your chart holds its own — the elements meet each other in reasonable balance.

receptive.name: Receptive
receptive.desc: Your day-master element runs lean. You receive and absorb easily; the growth edge is in assertion and self-sourcing.

bazi.innerForcesSub: Each pillar maps to a classical Ten-Gods archetype relative to your Inner Element.
bazi.hiddenInfluencesSub: Each earthly branch carries 1–3 additional stems that quietly shape the pillar.
bazi.supportingSub: The element your chart leans toward for balance — wear its color, face its direction, keep its numbers close.
bazi.premiumTeaserBody: Unlock your Inner Forces (classical Ten-Gods), Hidden Influences, Soul Sound, your Supporting Element with lucky color + direction + numbers, and Today's Lucky Color widget.

dream.title: Dream Interpreter
dream.intro: Describe your dream in as much detail as you remember. Don't worry about order or clarity — the mind works in symbols. We'll match archetypal patterns and offer reflective questions to sit with. Dreams don't have single meanings; they have invitations.
dream.label: Tell me about your dream
dream.placeholder: I was standing by a dark ocean and couldn't find my way home. A bird flew overhead carrying something in its beak...
dream.privacy: Your dream text is not saved. It is analysed locally on your device.
dream.needLonger: Please share a bit more about the dream (at least a few sentences).
dream.noMatch: No immediately common archetypes surfaced in this dream text — but that doesn't mean it's silent. Often the most personal dreams use symbols unique to your life. Sit with the strongest image from the dream. Ask: what is it the opposite of? What in my life does it rhyme with?
dream.practiceBody: Keep a notebook by your bed. Record dreams the moment you wake, before they fade. Over time, recurring symbols reveal the language your unconscious uses with you.
dream.genericReflection: Dreams bring messages — honour the question they leave with you.

dark-triad.title: Dark Triad Shadow
dark-triad.description: Three shadow traits psychologists call the 'dark triad' — narcissism, Machiavellianism, and psychopathy — exist to some degree in all of us. Surface where your shadow runs strongest.
whatYouGet: Healthy and shadow forms of each

disc.title: DISC Behavioural Profile
disc.description: A four-quadrant model of workplace behaviour: Dominance, Influence, Steadiness, Conscientiousness. See which style leads for you and how you naturally contribute to a team.
whatYouGet: How to collaborate with other styles

money-personality.title: Money Personality
money-personality.description: Five distinct patterns of relating to money — the Saver, the Spender, the Avoider, the Monk, the Status-Seeker. See which script your money self is running.
whatYouGet: When it serves you and when it doesn't

boundaries.title: Boundaries Check-In
boundaries.description: Where are your boundaries strong, where are they weak, and where do they shift depending on who's asking? Four patterns: rigid walls, porous openness, healthy flex, situation-dependent.
whatYouGet: Where your boundaries are firm, porous, or situational

burnout.title: Burnout Check
burnout.description: Burnout has three measurable dimensions: exhaustion (drained energy), cynicism (distance from the work), and efficacy-loss (I'm not effective anymore). See where you are today.
whatYouGet: Exhaustion vs cynicism vs efficacy-loss profile
Which dimension needs your attention first

communication.title: Communication Style
communication.description: Four styles emerge under difficulty: passive (hide), aggressive (attack), passive-aggressive (sideways), assertive (clear + respectful). See your default and which is available when you're regulated.
whatYouGet: A practice for the hard conversations

conflict.title: Conflict Style
conflict.description: The Thomas-Kilmann model identifies five modes for handling conflict: competing, collaborating, compromising, avoiding, accommodating. See your preferred response — and which modes you need to practice.

chronotype.title: Sleep Chronotype
chronotype.description: Four sleep-wake personalities by Dr. Michael Breus: the Lion (morning), the Bear (daytime), the Wolf (evening), the Dolphin (restless). Find your rhythm — and when your real peak hours are.
whatYouGet: Sleep + schedule tips that actually suit you

creative-type.title: Creative Type
creative-type.description: Five ways of being creative — five roles in the creative process. The Maker, the Dreamer, the Performer, the Organiser, the Analyser. See which you take on naturally — and who you partner best with.
whatYouGet: Your role in the creative process

spiritual-type.title: Spiritual Type
spiritual-type.description: Five ways of relating to the sacred, across all traditions: the Mystic (direct experience), the Ritualist (ceremony), the Seeker (study), the Servant (devotion through action), the Warrior (discipline as path).
whatYouGet: Your path of practice — Mystic / Ritualist / Seeker / Servant / Warrior
Strengths and shadows of your path

jungian-functions.title: Jungian Functions
jungian-functions.description: Your dominant Jungian cognitive function — Ni, Ne, Si, Se, Ti, Te, Fi, or Fe — and how it stacks with your MBTI letters into the way you process the world.

love-styles.title: Love Styles
love-styles.description: Which of the four Greek love styles you lead with: Eros (passion), Philia (deep friendship), Storge (steady warmth), or Agape (unconditional). One isn't better — they ask different things of you.
whatYouGet: Which of 4 Greek love styles you lead with

parenting-style.title: Parenting Style
parenting-style.description: Your default Baumrind parenting style — Authoritative, Authoritarian, Permissive, or Neglectful — under stress versus when you're at your best. What research says about each, and one affirmation to carry.
whatYouGet: Your default style (authoritative / authoritarian / permissive / neglectful)

learning-style.title: Learning Style
learning-style.description: Your VARK preference — Visual, Auditory, Read/Write, or Kinesthetic. How you actually take in information, and how to design study + work to match the wiring.
whatYouGet: How you best take in information

empath-hsp.title: Empath or HSP
empath-hsp.description: Empath, Highly Sensitive Person, both, or neither. What each means neurologically — they're related but not the same — and practical self-care for whichever wiring you have.

self-compassion.title: Self-Compassion
self-compassion.description: Your dominant self-compassion stance — Self-Kind, Self-Judging, Mindful, or Over-Identified. Where you support yourself and where you don't, with one next-step affirmation.

mood-screener.title: Mood Screener
mood-screener.description: A two-week mood signal read using non-diagnostic PHQ-2-style questions. NOT a diagnosis — a self-reflection mirror, with crisis resources surfaced if your answers suggest you need support.

anxiety-profile.title: Anxiety Profile
anxiety-profile.description: Where anxiety tends to show up in your body and life — somatic (body-first), generalised, social, or performance — and which tools tend to actually help that flavour.
whatYouGet: Where anxiety shows up for you

leadership-style.title: Leadership Style
leadership-style.description: Your default leadership mode under pressure — Visionary, Servant, Commander, or Coach. Including who you should pair with, and where this style breaks under stress.

productivity-style.title: Productivity Style
productivity-style.description: Your work-rhythm profile — Deep Worker, Sprinter, Connector, or Organiser. Where your energy actually lands, the ideal environment for it, and what to stop forcing.

relationship-readiness.title: Relationship Readiness
relationship-readiness.description: Where you are in your readiness for partnership — ready, healing, avoiding, or rushing. Without judgment, with one thing to tend to first.

wellness-type.title: Wellness Type
wellness-type.description: How you best restore — Athlete (move), Healer (deep self-care), Contemplative (stillness), or Balanced (mix). The tools that actually work for your nature, not the trends.

mood.title: Daily Mood
mood.intro: How is today landing in you? Pick the shape of it, notice the intensity, optionally write a sentence. Over time your mood curve becomes a map.
mood.noEntriesYet: Log today's mood to start your curve.
mood.privacyNote: Your mood log lives on this device only. It is not uploaded or synced.

compat.title: Partner Compatibility
compat.intro: Combines MBTI cognitive-function fit with astrology elemental compatibility to show you where you click, where you rub, and where the growth edges live. Enter what you know about each side — at least one from each.
compat.needBothSides: Need at least one data point from each side (MBTI or birth date).

fengshui.title: Feng Shui Bagua
fengshui.intro: The Bagua map divides life into nine areas. Rate how each area of YOUR life feels right now on a 1-5 scale. We'll surface the area most wanting attention and the Feng Shui adjustments that nourish it.
fengshui.placement: Place these adjustments in the {{dir}} of your room (oriented from the entry door).

community.title: Community
community.placeholder: Share a reading, a thought, a question...
community.postedUnderReview: Posted — our team will review shortly.
community.commentUnderReview: Comment posted — our team will review shortly.
community.contentBlocked: This content conflicts with our community guidelines.
community.empty: No posts here yet. Be the first.
community.signInToPost: Sign in to post, react, and comment.
community.noComments: No comments yet. Be the first to respond.

whisperingWell.title: Whispering Well
whisperingWell.intro: A quiet place to whisper the unsayable. All posts are anonymous. Respect for each other is the rule. If something needs help, say so clearly — someone is listening.
whisperingWell.placeholder: What needs to be said but has no audience?
whisperingWell.empty: The well is quiet. Be the first to whisper.

askOracle.subtitle: Personalized read based on your chart and memory
askOracle.question: Read this for me — {{context}}. What is it pointing to in my life right now?
askOracle.errorGeneric: Could not reach the Oracle. Try again.

moonstoneTopUp.title: Top up Moonstones
moonstoneTopUp.subtitle: Unlock readings, tip live hosts, and book advisor sessions.
moonstoneTopUp.success: {{n}} Moonstones on the way — takes a few seconds to land.
moonstoneTopUp.securePayment: Secure checkout powered by Stripe. One-time purchase — cancel anytime.
moonstoneTopUp.playStorePurchase: Charged through Google Play. Manage purchases in your Google account.

companion.title: Companion
companion.emptyState: Start by asking anything — a question held in your chest, a dream you want read, a name you want to understand.
companion.dailyLimitReached: Daily message limit reached — come back tomorrow.

sage.name: Sage
sage.intro: Calm, wise, measured. Draws on contemplative traditions east and west. Offers questions, not performance.

oracle.name: Oracle
oracle.intro: Speaks in images and archetypes. Metaphor-rich. Maps the symbolic weather of the moment.

mystic.name: Mystic
mystic.intro: Direct, brief, comfortable with paradox. Zen-shaped. Sometimes answers with a sharper question.

priestess.name: Priestess
priestess.intro: Warm, embodied, intuitive. Tracks the person behind the question. Offers practices as often as wisdom.

advisors.title: Advisors
advisors.intro: Meet the readers joining Arcana. Paid sessions are rolling out gradually. Express interest to be notified when each advisor opens bookings.
advisors.empty: No advisors available yet. Check back soon.
advisors.bookingsComingSoon: Paid sessions are rolling out gradually. Tell us what you'd like help with and we'll notify you when this advisor opens bookings.
advisors.topicPlaceholder: What would you like to work on? (optional)
advisors.interestSubmitted: Interest noted — we'll notify you when {{n}} opens bookings.

new.name: New Moon
new.guidance: A quiet threshold. Name what you are beginning — not what is finished. Do not force clarity; just set direction.
new.ritual: Write three intentions for the coming cycle. Fold the paper, keep it somewhere private until the full moon.

waxing-crescent.name: Waxing Crescent
waxing-crescent.guidance: Take the first small action toward what you named at the new moon. Consistency beats intensity here.
waxing-crescent.ritual: Light a candle and list three tiny steps you can take this week. Take the first one today.

first-quarter.name: First Quarter
first-quarter.guidance: Expect resistance now — this is when momentum meets doubt. Recommit or adjust; do not abandon.
first-quarter.ritual: Name one obstacle standing between you and your intention. Write the exact next action that moves past it.

waxing-gibbous.name: Waxing Gibbous
waxing-gibbous.guidance: The result is close but needs polish. Do the boring, careful work now — editing, checking, repairing.
waxing-gibbous.ritual: Review what you have built this cycle. What one detail, if improved, would change the whole?

full.name: Full Moon
full.guidance: Harvest what is ripe. Celebrate progress; acknowledge what is now clearly not working. Emotions run high — move slowly.
full.ritual: Under moonlight (or facing a window), name three things completed this cycle. Speak one truth you have been avoiding.

waning-gibbous.name: Waning Gibbous
waning-gibbous.guidance: Share what you learned. Teach, thank, record. This is integration — not striving.
waning-gibbous.ritual: Send one message of thanks to someone who supported you this cycle. Write one lesson in your journal.

last-quarter.name: Last Quarter
last-quarter.guidance: Clear space. Finish what is finishable; release what is not. Do not start new projects yet.
last-quarter.ritual: Name one habit, item, or commitment to release. Write it down, then cross it out.

waning-crescent.name: Waning Crescent
waning-crescent.guidance: Do less. Sleep more. Dream. This is not procrastination — it is the nervous system restoring before the next cycle.
waning-crescent.ritual: Unplug for an hour. No screens, no productivity. Sit, walk, lie down. Notice what surfaces when you stop.

runes.title: Rune Casting
runes.intro: Three staves from the Elder Futhark — past, present, future. Hold a question, then cast.

dice.title: Dice Oracle
dice.intro: The simplest divination — three dice fall, their sum speaks. Hold a question, then roll. Sixteen possible readings from 3 to 18.

crisis.title: You are not alone
crisis.subtitle: We noticed some of what you wrote. If you are hurting right now, please reach for one of these — they are free and confidential.
crisis.footer: Arcana is not a medical service. If you are in immediate danger, please call your local emergency number.

referral.title: Invite & earn
referral.heading: Share Arcana, earn Moonstones
referral.subtitle: Each friend who joins with your code earns you 100 Moonstones. They get 100 too.
referral.shareText: I've been using Arcana for tarot + astrology — use my code for 100 free Moonstones: {{url}}
referral.redeemHelper: Enter a friend's code in your first 30 days to claim 100 Moonstones.
referral.alreadyRedeemed: You've already redeemed a referral code.

errors.selfRedeem: You can't use your own code.
errors.accountTooOld: Referral codes only work in the first 30 days.

yearAhead.title: Year Ahead
yearAhead.cardSub: A month-by-month map of the biggest transits to your natal chart.
yearAhead.needsBirthData: Add your full birth data first
yearAhead.needsBirthDataBody: Year-ahead forecasts need date, time, and place of birth to compute transits to your natal chart. Add them in Profile → Edit profile.

locked.feat2: Outer-planet transits to your personal planets
locked.feat3: Start/end dates for each transit window

yearAhead.insufficientBalance: Not enough Moonstones — earn more via daily check-in or invites
yearAhead.priceNote: Also available via Stripe at ${{price}} (coming soon)
yearAhead.errorNatalMissing: We could not find your computed natal chart. Please re-enter your birth data in Profile.
yearAhead.errorGeneric: Could not load forecast. Try again in a moment.
yearAhead.emptyMonth: A quiet month, astrologically. Use it to rest.
yearAhead.disclaimer: Astrology is a symbolic lens, not a prediction. Transits describe the archetypal weather — what you do within it is yours.

natalReport.title: Full Natal Chart
natalReport.cardSub: Every planet in its sign and house, every aspect, with interpretations.
natalReport.needsBirthDataBody: The full natal chart needs date, time, and place of birth. Add them in Profile → Edit profile.

locked.feat4: Save as PDF or print from your browser

natalReport.insufficientBalance: Not enough Moonstones — earn more via daily check-in or invites
natalReport.priceNote: Also available via Stripe at ${{price}} (coming soon)
natalReport.errorChartMissing: We could not find your computed natal chart. Please re-enter your birth data in Profile.
natalReport.overlayFailed: Couldn't load that overlay. Check your connection and try again.
natalReport.earnHint: Earn via daily check-in + inviting friends.
natalReport.disclaimer: Astrology is a symbolic lens, not a prediction. Your chart is a map of your temperament — what you do with it is yours.

careerReport.title: Career Archetype
careerReport.needsMbtiBody: This report is derived from your MBTI personality type. Complete the 12-question Quick Personality quiz (or the full 70-question version) and your archetype will unlock.

locked.body: A ~900-word coaching-grade report tailored to your type — best-fit roles, drains, collaboration patterns, blind spots, and a first-90-days plan.
locked.feat4: First-90-days plan in a new role

careerReport.insufficientBalance: Not enough Moonstones — earn more via daily check-in or invites
careerReport.priceNote: Also available via Stripe at ${{price}} (coming soon)

compatInvite.createSubtitle: Send a link. They take their side; you both see the joint reading.
compatInvite.nothingToShare: Take the personality quiz or add your birth date first.
compatInvite.fromNamed: {{name}} wants to see how you vibe
compatInvite.fromAnon: Someone wants to see how you vibe
compatInvite.readyBody: Your existing profile already has what this reading needs. Tap below to reveal the joint result.
compatInvite.needMbti: You need to take the personality quiz first.
compatInvite.needBirthDate: Add your birth date in Profile first.
compatInvite.notFound: This invite could not be found or has expired.
compatInvite.ownInvite: This is your own invite. Share the link with a friend or partner — they need to respond.
compatInvite.signInTitle: Sign in to see your match
compatInvite.signInBody: Create a free account or sign in to take your side of the compatibility reading.
compatInvite.noScore: Your responses are recorded. A richer joint reading is coming for this kind of quiz soon.
compatInvite.shareText: Take this compatibility reading with me on Arcana: {{url}}

errors.selfInvite: You can't respond to your own invite.

advisorBooking.noAvailability: This advisor has not published availability yet. Check back soon.

advisorBooking.topicPlaceholder: Anything specific — a decision, a relationship, a transit…
advisorBooking.insufficientBalance: Not enough Moonstones. Top up and try again.
advisorBooking.slotTaken: That slot just got taken. Pick another.
advisorBooking.disclaimer: Cancel for a full refund any time before the session starts.

advisorSession.title: Session
advisorSession.startsIn: Starts in {{n}} minutes. Start any time within 5 minutes of the scheduled time.

advisorDashboard.title: Advisor dashboard
advisorDashboard.notAdvisorBody: You are not set up as an advisor yet. Advisors are hand-vetted — reach out to apply.
advisorDashboard.availabilityHint: Clients can book 30-min buckets within these windows. Times are in your device timezone.
advisorDashboard.noSlots: No availability yet — add one above.
advisorDashboard.invalidSlot: End time must be after start time.

liveRoom.notLiveYet: Voice opens when the host starts the room.
liveRoom.signInToUnlock: Sign in to unlock the replay

advisorVerify.title: Advisor verification
advisorVerify.startBody: Before clients can book you, we confirm identity. Upload a government ID plus a short selfie video saying your full name and today's date. Reviewed within 72 hours.
advisorVerify.approvedBody: Your advisor profile is live in the directory.
advisorVerify.rejectedHelp: Contact advisors@tarotlife.app if you believe this is wrong.
advisorVerify.selfieLabel: Selfie video (say your name + today's date)
advisorVerify.incomplete: Fill in every field and upload both files.
advisorVerify.privacyNote: Documents are encrypted and only visible to admin reviewers.

sandbox.title: Archetypal sandbox
sandbox.intro: Pick symbolic objects, place them on the plinth, and the oracle reads the arrangement. Preview release — positions are spiralled automatically, drag-drop is coming.
sandbox.preview: Preview — drag-to-place and save/share are coming.

quickReading.title: 3-second reading
quickReading.intro: Ask anything. A single card is drawn, woven with your signals, and returned as a short reading to sit with.
quickReading.questionPlaceholder: What is mine to focus on this week? Where is the friction in my work coming from? What am I avoiding?
quickReading.memoryUsed: Drawing on what we've talked about before.
quickReading.disclaimer: Readings are for self-reflection, not prediction or professional advice.
quickReading.errorRateLimit: You're asking fast — slow down and try again in a moment.
quickReading.errorGeneric: Could not generate a reading. Try again.

tarotCompanion.title: Tarot companion
tarotCompanion.empty: Pull a card to begin a conversation.
tarotCompanion.seedMessage: I just drew {{card}}. Help me sit with what it might be pointing to right now.

chartWheel.tapPrompt: Tap a planet, house, or aspect line.

liveRooms.title: Live rooms
liveRooms.intro: Scheduled live gatherings — full moon circles, Mercury retrograde debriefs, live tarot pulls. Audio-first, soon. RSVP to reserve your seat.
liveRooms.empty: No live rooms on the calendar yet — check back soon.
liveRooms.rsvpConfirmed: You're on the list — we'll notify you.
liveRooms.voiceComingSoon: Audio streaming is rolling out gradually. RSVP and we'll notify you when your room opens.

pickACard.title: Pick a card
pickACard.subtitleChoose: Breathe. Notice which one calls to you. Tap to reveal.
pickACard.subtitlePicked: You've drawn your card for today.

soulmate.title: Soulmate Score
soulmate.subtitle: A classical synastry read, distilled to one number. Free, shareable, fast.
soulmate.needsBirthDataBody: We need your birth date (time is a bonus) to compare charts. Add it in Settings → Edit Profile.
soulmate.computeFailed: Couldn't compute. Check your connection and try again.
soulmate.noAspects: No significant aspects found. Try adding a birth time.
soulmate.noTimeHint: Add a birth time for a more precise score.
soulmate.shareText: Our Arcana soulmate score is {{score}}/100 ({{vibe}}). Try yours at arcana.app
soulmate.disclaimer: A score isn't a verdict — it's a mirror for conversation. Charts describe patterns, not fate.

vibeDescriptions.transcendent: Your charts sing in a rare harmony — deep recognition, easy chemistry, aligned purpose.
vibeDescriptions.strong: The basic shapes fit. There's real attraction and real ease — and enough difference to keep things alive.
vibeDescriptions.steady: A grounded, workable pairing. You meet in some places and lean past each other in others. Works with effort.
vibeDescriptions.complex: Magnetic but friction-heavy. The pull is real; so are the edges. Growth-rich if you can hold the heat.
vibeDescriptions.testing: The patterns don't flow easily. Possible — but it takes intentionality more than gravity.
